title: A Friend's Wish. To C. W. S.
content:
Give me your last Aloha,
    When I go out of sight,
    Over the dark rim of the sea
    Into the Polar night!

    And all the Northland give you
    Skoal for the voyage begun,
    When your bright summer sail goes down
    Into the zones of sun!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Bliss Carman (William) delivers a powerful performance in "A Friend's Wish. To C. W. S."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
